title: improved spawners
description: the resource pack completely changes the spawner by replacing their models and textures, making them much more beautiful
body:
![improved spawners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ece0af4516cdbd42736b6ce85af8ec1615c1d70_0.webp)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **The resource pack changes all regular and trial spawners, replacing their models and textures, and it also changes the textures and models for Vault**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- changes textures and models for spawners
- changes textures and models for trial spawners
- modifies textures and models for Vault
- spawner textures have glowing pixels
- changes the textures of the keys

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

to work, you need OptiFine

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
